name: East Frankfort Park
description: Come play pickleball at East Frankfort Park in Frankfort, KY! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights. Reservations are not available.

name: Frankfort Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Frankfort Country Club in Frankfort, KY! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, water, restrooms, and food.

name: Juniper Hills Park
description: Juniper Hills Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frankfort, KY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Lakeview Park
description: Lakeview Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frankfort, KY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms.
